query:
-- Check matched items with their service assignments
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus, bi.lineAmount
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.matchStatus = 'matched'
AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
LIMIT 5;
